steps.title: Move from general to specific
steps.content: The first sentence broadly says Dalton challenged prevailing views about landscapes and cultures. The second sentence gives the specific content of his argument: cultures actively shape their own development through environmental interactions.

steps.title: Choose the elaborating transition
steps.content: Choice A would show similarity, Choice B would show sequence or conclusion, and Choice C would show result. The remaining transition signals that the second sentence provides precise detail about the first. The answer is D.
